source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/15_규격 Test/1. [A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW] IEC 60601-1 CB Certificate (3.1).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: CB Test Certificate NO124542 for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents that a sample of the product was tested and found to be in conformity with listed IEC 60601 standards as shown in Test Report Ref. Nos. REP001824 and REP001824_1.
keyPoints: Product is identified as Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
Applicant, manufacturer, and factory are H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Korea, Republic of.
Model / Type Ref. lists A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
Certificate states conformity with IEC 60601-1-6:2010, IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD1:2013, IEC 60601-1:2005, and IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD1:2012.
Additional information states all applicable clauses of IEC 62366:2007 + AMD1:2014 have been addressed.

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit revision or version number is present in the source text.
Issuing National Certification Body is referenced, but the body name is not stated in the provided text; only a Norway address is present.
Date format is provided as 08-11-2022 without clarifying whether it is day-month-year or month-day-year.
